channel.title: GitHub Objective-C++ Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Objective-C++ in GitHub

item.title: KhronosGroup/MoltenVK
item.description: MoltenVK is a Vulkan Portability implementation. It layers a subset of the high-performance, industry-standard Vulkan graphics and compute API over Apple's Metal graphics framework, enabling Vulkan applications to run on macOS, iOS and tvOS.

item.title: bugsnag/bugsnag-cocoa-performance
item.description: Monitor the start-up, screen loading and network requests of your iOS app and see the results in your BugSnag dashboard.

item.title: thusvill/LiveWallpaperMacOS
item.description: This is a Opensource Live wallpaper solution for MacOS

item.title: facebookarchive/pop
item.description: An extensible iOS and OS X animation library, useful for physics-based interactions.

item.title: pocketsvg/PocketSVG
item.description: Easily convert your SVG files into CGPaths, CAShapeLayers, and UIBezierPaths

item.title: microsoft/onnxruntime-swift-package-manager
item.description: A light-weight repository for providing Swift Package Manager support for ONNX Runtime.
